# Milestones

GitHub milestones are tracked here until they are created in the repository settings.

## Repository Foundation

Infrastructure for documentation, quality checks, collaboration templates, and release process.

## Draft Import

Import and split the existing author draft without changing intellectual content.

## Structure Review

Review navigation, chapter order, cross-references, and author-note markers.

## Preview Release

Generate an author-approved preview release of the web and PDF editions.
